output.summary: Fixed Gutenberg editor z-index conflict on tall TextCards using CSS !important modifiers to override WordPress's default ::after selection styles. Reverted the <span> element approach per user feedback and kept the original DOM structure.

filesModified.change: Removed <span> element, restored md:after:* classes with !important modifiers on key properties
filesModified.reason: User feedback: 'don't change the structure, use css classes to override wp default style'. Using !important modifiers ensures block's ::after styles win over Gutenberg's selection outline styles.

approachChange.previousApproach: Add explicit <span> element to avoid ::after pseudo-element conflict
approachChange.userFeedback: don't change the structure, use css classes to override wp default style
approachChange.newApproach: Use Tailwind !important modifiers on ::after classes to override Gutenberg's default styles
approachChange.reason: Maintain original DOM structure while solving the z-index conflict through CSS specificity

removed.location: Inside block wrapper div, lines 83-85 (previous version)
removed.element: <span className="hidden md:block absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 h-1/2 bg-accent rounded-3xl -z-1" />
removed.reason: User requested to not change DOM structure, use CSS overrides instead

restored.classes: md:after:!absolute md:after:!inset-x-0 md:after:!top-auto md:after:!bottom-0 md:after:!h-1/2 md:after:bg-accent md:after:rounded-3xl md:after:!-z-1
importantModifiers: md:after:!top-auto - Ensures top: auto !important (overrides Gutenberg's inset: 0)
md:after:!h-1/2 - Ensures height: 50% !important (overrides Gutenberg's full coverage)
md:after:!-z-1 - Ensures z-index: -1 !important (most critical - overrides Gutenberg's z-index: 1)

unchanged.reason: ::before pseudo-element is not affected by Gutenberg's selection styles

blockNeeds.top: auto - DIFFERENT from Gutenberg's inset: 0 (which sets all sides to 0)
blockNeeds.bottom: 0 - DIFFERENT from Gutenberg's inset: 0 (which sets all sides to 0)
blockNeeds.height: 50% - DIFFERENT from Gutenberg (which lets inset: 0 control height)

importantNeeded: !absolute - Ensures position stays absolute (though Gutenberg uses same value)
!inset-x-0 - Ensures horizontal positioning (though Gutenberg uses same value via inset)
!top-auto - CRITICAL: Prevents Gutenberg's inset: 0 from setting top: 0
!bottom-0 - CRITICAL: Prevents Gutenberg's inset: 0 from removing bottom: 0
!h-1/2 - CRITICAL: Forces height to 50%, overriding Gutenberg's full coverage
!-z-1 - CRITICAL: Forces z-index: -1, overriding Gutenberg's z-index: 1
cssOverrideStrategy.reasoning: Tailwind's !important modifier creates CSS with !important flag, increasing specificity enough to override Gutenberg's higher-specificity selector. The ! prefix in Tailwind (e.g., !-z-1) generates z-index: -1 !important in the compiled CSS.

warnings: Webpack performance warnings (asset size limits) - pre-existing, not related to changes
buildStatus.details: Build completed successfully with 'webpack compiled with 3 warnings'. All warnings are pre-existing performance recommendations. TypeScript compilation passed without errors.

syncStatus.details: PHP template (TextCard.php) intentionally left unchanged. The ::after pseudo-element conflict is editor-only because Gutenberg's block selection CSS is only loaded in the editor. The frontend renders without these styles, so the ::after approach works correctly in PHP without !important modifiers.

domStructure.details: No changes to DOM structure. The block wrapper div and its children (RichText elements) remain unchanged. Only CSS classes on the wrapper were modified to add !important flags.

editorTesting: Open Gutenberg editor and add a TextCard with isTall enabled
Verify the split background (top and bottom halves) renders behind the content, not on top
Verify the background maintains the accent color and rounded corners
Verify the background height is 50% for each half (not full coverage)
Toggle isTall off and verify the single background still works correctly
cssInspection: Inspect the tall card's computed styles in browser dev tools
Verify ::after has top: auto !important and bottom: 0 !important
Verify ::after has z-index: -1 !important (should override Gutenberg's z-index: 1)
Verify no outline or selection border appears over the background when selected
frontendTesting: View the test page at https://ign.localhost/test-masonry-cards/
Verify tall text cards have the split background effect (top and bottom halves)
Verify non-tall cards have a single full background
Verify all backgrounds are accent-colored and behind the text content
